free_text: Spectra of charged particles from the reactions
induced by 3He ions (E=23 and 35 MeV) in 57Fe and
Self-supporting foils of 57Fe (1.9 mg/cm2 thick) and
and E detector (1 to 3.5 mm thick) for helion and
Si dE detector (100 um thick) and
CsI(Tl) E detector for proton and deuteron detection
